tasks.subject: Task 1: Hero section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace lines 1–8 with centred hero: icon, title, tagline, two badge rows, footnotes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Icon at 90px centred
- [ ] Two badge rows with correct URLs
- [ ] Footnotes present

**Verify:** `git diff README.md | head -60`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff README.md | head -60", "acceptanceCriteria": ["icon at 90px centred", "two badge rows", "footnotes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Feature highlights grid
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert 6-cell 3×2 markdown table after hero, before Features heading.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`

**Verify:** `grep -A4 'Full stitch toolkit' README.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -A4 'Full stitch toolkit' README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3x2 table present", "beta marker on PDF scanner"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Videos section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert 10 collapsible details blocks with video placeholders and shot list comments.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`

**Verify:** `grep -c '<details>' README.md` → `10`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c '<details>' README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["10 details blocks", "VIDEO_URL_HERE placeholders", "beta caveats on 9 and 10"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Getting started, collapse features, changelog, backlog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update Getting Started, wrap Features in details block, add Changelog, keep Backlog.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`

**Verify:** `grep -c '<details>' README.md` → `11`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c '<details>' README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["11 total details blocks", "./run and ./run.ps1 in getting started", "changelog section present"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Changeset and PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add changeset file, push branch, open PR.

**Files:**
- Create: `.changeset/readme-redesign.md`

**Verify:** `gh pr view`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".changeset/readme-redesign.md"], "verifyCommand": "gh pr view", "acceptanceCriteria": ["changeset committed", "PR open"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
